metadata.author: Core Team
metadata.description: Use Step to watch two pop actions one by one, and use Reset to return to the initial stack and try again.

introduces: ejecución paso a paso y reinicio mientras repites una acción de pila

messages.title: Use Step and Reset with one stack
messages.body: This level uses only stack A. The goal is to empty it by applying the same action twice. Build that short solution, then use Step to watch the stack change one move at a time and Reset to return to the beginning.

messages.title: Check the stack after the first move
messages.body: After one Step, stack A should still contain one element. Use that intermediate state to confirm whether your first action is correct before finishing the level.

messages.title: This level repeats the same move twice
messages.body: You do not need a second structure here. Place the stack action twice, inspect the board after each Step, and use Reset whenever you want to retry from the original state.

introduces: ejecución paso a paso y reinicio mientras repites una acción de pila
